description_long: This is a black upright piano positioned against a dark, patterned wall, with a matching dark floor. The piano features a rectangular body with a flat top and a visible keyboard section at the front. The keys are arranged in a standard linear fashion, with alternating white and black keys, though the details are somewhat obscured by the lighting. The piano's surface appears glossy and hard, reflecting some ambient light, and the overall structure is robust and boxy. No visible pedals or brand markings are present on the front or sides. The piano is set within a partially enclosed space, giving it a formal and somewhat dramatic appearance.
description: A black upright piano with a glossy finish, set against a dark patterned wall and floor, featuring a standard keyboard layout and a robust, boxy structure.
description_view_0: Front view showing the piano's keyboard and the patterned wall behind it.
description_view_1: Side view with the piano's right side and the enclosure's wall visible, obscuring the keyboard.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the piano and the enclosure, with no keyboard or details visible.
description_view_3: Left side view with the piano's left side and enclosure wall, keyboard not visible.
attribute_keyboard_layout: Standard linear keyboard with alternating white and black keys, typical of upright pianos; exact number of keys not clearly visible.
